sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85624" key="pompeutiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πομπ-ευτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n85624.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">processional</tr_> of the foot <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παλιμβάκχειος,</foreign> Sch.Heph.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0062.tlg035:pp.216,302" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">pp.216,302</biblScope> </bibl>C.</sense> </entryFree>
